items.title: Spent Nuclear Fuel Could Be America Answer to Russia Uranium Grip
Wall Street Risk Rally Powers Past War Stalemate
items.summary: Three months into the Iran war, it has become all but impossible to damp the bullish spirit driving global markets for risky assets.

items.title: Russian timber imports : How laundered wood from Russia is bypassing Australian sanctions and funding the war in Ukraine
Israel - Hezbollah war : Israeli military captures historic Beaufort Castle as ground invasion expands in southern Lebanon
Petrobras Cuts Diesel Prices Amid Federal Subsidy Plan
items.summary: Brazil’s state-controlled oil giant Petroleo Brasileiro SA is reducing domestic diesel prices starting Monday as part of a government subsidy program to shield consumers from the war in the Middle East.

items.title: Oil Rises From Six-Week Low Amid Uncertainty Over US-Iran Deal
items.summary: Oil rose from a six-week low amid uncertainty over the outlook for a peace deal to end the war in Iran.

items.title: IRAN WAR LATEST : Trump says Iran agrees to no nuclear weapons
India Rate Risks, Fiscal Worries Add to Pressure on Bond Yields
items.summary: The recent surge in Indian bond yields may extend as investors weigh prospects of interest-rate hikes, while concerns grow over the government’s fiscal position.

items.title: Russia accuses drone strike on Zaporizhzhia nuclear plant , Ukraine denies – Padovanews
Goldman Sees Two-Sided Risk to Oil as Lower Use Offsets Iran War
items.summary: Goldman Sachs Group Inc. sees two-sided risks to oil prices as a slump in demand competes with supply losses from the Middle East because of the Iran war.

items.title: ECB’s Schnabel Sees Risk of Unanchored Inflation Views From War
items.summary: The European Central Bank can no longer look through the inflationary impact of the war in Iran as price pressures spread beyond energy and the risk of unanchored inflation expectations rises, according to Executive Board member Isabel Schnabel.

items.title: US - Israel - Iran War Live Updates : Trump says  most of the agreement  with Iran focuses on nuclear issues
US - Iran war LIVE : US proposes fresh Israel - Lebanon ceasefire ; calls on Hezbollah to take 1st step
India Keeps Local Jet Fuel Prices Unchanged After Airline Plea
items.summary: India’s state-owned oil refiners have kept jet fuel prices steady for local flights following a plea from airlines to hold off on further hikes as they grapple with the fallout from the Iran war.

items.title: A Strategic Debacle, But Stocks Keep Winning
items.summary: A lot is riding on whether inflation from the Iran war can stay manageable.

items.title: Iran war inflation shock set to fall short of 2022 surge
items.summary: FT analysis shows economists more optimistic now than three months after Russia’s full-scale invasion of Ukraine

items.title: EM Stocks Hit Record High on AI, Currencies Lower as Oil Climbs
items.summary: Emerging Asian equities rose to a record, propelled by continuing enthusiasm for the artificial intelligence trade that’s bolstered global stocks despite the Iran war.

items.title: ECB Schnabel says Iran war inflation too broad to look through , flags rate hikes
Oil Prices Climbs on Uncertainty Over US-Iran Deal
items.summary: Oil rose from a six-week low as uncertainty continues over the outlook for a peace deal to end the US war in Iran and open the Strait of Hormuz. Bloomberg's Anthony di Paola reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

items.title: UK House Prices Fall as Mortgage Costs Bite, Nationwide Says
items.summary: UK house prices fell for the first time in five months, according to one of Britain’s biggest mortgage lenders, suggesting the surge in borrowing costs triggered by the Iran war is placing a strain on prospective homebuyers.
